goal: simple_graph_closed_walk(g, start, steps) = (simple_graph_walk(g, start, start, steps) and steps.length > 0)

goal: simple_graph_closed_walk(g, start, steps) = (simple_graph_walk(g, start, start, steps) and steps.length > 0)
